ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Images with size parameters (e.g. ![[image.png|200]]) are now handled differently to fix rendering in tables. This may cause notes with images to show up as changed. This is expected and safe to publish.
ast.target: 带有尺寸参数的图片（例如 ![[image.png|200]]）现在处理方式不同，以修复表格中的渲染问题。\n\t\t\t\t\t这可能导致包含图片的笔记显示为已更改。这是预期行为，可以安全发布。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Differences between your local file and the published file.
The content may look a bit different from your note. This is because it shows the note after being processed by the plugin.
ast.target:
本地文件与已发布文件之间的差异。
内容可能看起来与你的笔记略有不同。这是因为它显示的是 经过插件处理后的笔记。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
• One rule-per line
  • The format is [from_vault_path]:[to_garden_path]
  • Matching will exit on first match
ast.target:
• 每行一条规则
  • 格式为 [from_vault_path]:[to_garden_path]
  • 匹配将在首次匹配时退出

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Garden Key
Enter your Garden Key from Forestry.md to connect your digital garden
ast.target:
Garden Key
从 Forestry.md 输入你的 Garden Key 以连接你的数字花园

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Connection Error
Something went wrong when connecting to Forestry.md
ast.target:
连接错误
连接到 Forestry.md 时出现问题

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Connection Error
Something went wrong when connecting to Forestry.md
ast.target:
连接错误
连接到\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tForestry.md 时出现问题

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: You've reached your usage limit. Upgrade your plan to continue publishing.
ast.target: 你已达到使用限制。升级你的计划以继续发布。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.target: 正在加载 Forestry.md 设置...

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Define regex filters to replace note content before publishing.
ast.target: 定义正则表达式过滤器，以在发布前替换笔记内容。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.target: 格式：[正则表达式模式, 替换内容, 正则表达式标志]

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Example: filter [:smile:, \u{1F600}, g] will replace text with real emojis
ast.target: 示例：过滤器 [:smile:, \\u{1F600}, g] 将用真实表情符号替换文本

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: A GitHub token with contents permissions. You can see how to generate it
ast.target: 一个具有 contents 权限的 GitHub 令牌。你可以查看如何生成它

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Frontmatter properties are now nested differently to support
					Obsidian Bases. This may cause notes to show up as changed.
					This is expected and safe to publish. You must update your
					site template to use Bases.
ast.target:
Frontmatter 属性现在以不同方式嵌套以支持
					Obsidian Bases。这可能导致笔记显示为已更改。
					这是预期行为，可以安全发布。你必须更新你的
					站点模板以使用 Bases。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Define rules to rewrite note paths/folder structure, using following
		syntax:
ast.target: 定义规则以重写笔记路径/文件夹结构，使用以下\n\t\t语法：

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Example: If you want the vault folder "Personal/Journal" to be shown as
		only "Journal" in the left file sidebar in the garden, add the line
		"Personal/Journal:Journal"
ast.target: 示例：如果你想将保险库文件夹 \"Personal/Journal\" 在花园的左侧文件侧边栏中仅显示为\n\t\t\"Journal\"，请添加行\n\t\t\"Personal/Journal:Journal\"

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
To define a folder as the root folder for the garden, use
		`[from_vault_path]:`
ast.target: 要将某个文件夹定义为花园的根文件夹，请使用\n\t\t`[from_vault_path]:`

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Saving will not update the garden directly, and changes will be visible
		in the publication center.
ast.target: 保存不会直接更新花园，更改将在\n\t\t发布中心可见。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Drag and drop to reorder the navigation items on your site.
ast.target: 拖放以重新排列你站点上的导航项。

ast.target: 加载远程 UI 字符串失败：

ast.target: 加载远程外观设置失败：

ast.name: info
ast.target: 网站图标相同，跳过更新

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the GitHub repository

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize the order of files and folders in your site's navigation.
ast.target: 自定义您站点导航中文件和文件夹的顺序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define rules to rewrite note folder structure in the garden. See the modal for more information.
ast.target: 定义规则以重写花园中的笔记文件夹结构。更多信息请参见模态框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show detailed logs in the developer console. Useful for troubleshooting.
ast.target: 在开发者控制台中显示详细日志。用于故障排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Absolute path to your local digital garden folder. Used by the 'Export Garden to Local Folder' command.
ast.target: 您本地数字花园文件夹的绝对路径。由“导出花园到本地文件夹”命令使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default settings for each published note. These can be overwritten per note via frontmatter.
ast.target: 每个已发布笔记的默认设置。这些可以通过笔记的 frontmatter 覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines whether to show a link back to the homepage or not.
ast.target: 决定是否显示返回主页的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, notes will show its local graph in a sidebar on desktop and at the bottom of the page on mobile.
ast.target: 开启后，笔记将在桌面端的侧边栏和移动端的页面底部显示其本地图谱。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, notes will show backlinks in a sidebar on desktop and at the bottom of the page on mobile.
ast.target: 开启后，笔记将在桌面端的侧边栏和移动端的页面底部显示反向链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, notes will show all headers as a table of content in a sidebar on desktop. It will not be shown on mobile devices.
ast.target: 开启后，笔记将在桌面端的侧边栏中将所有标题显示为目录。在移动设备上不会显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, the title of the note will show on top of the page.
ast.target: 开启后，笔记的标题将显示在页面顶部。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, a filetree will be shown on your site.
ast.target: 开启后，您的站点上将显示文件树。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, users will be able to search through the content of your site.
ast.target: 开启后，用户将能够搜索您站点的内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, hovering over links to notes in your garden shows a scrollable preview.
ast.target: 开启后，将鼠标悬停在花园中笔记的链接上会显示可滚动的预览。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, tags in your frontmatter will be displayed on each note. If search is enabled, clicking on a tag will bring up a search for all notes containing that tag.
ast.target: 开启后，您 frontmatter 中的标签将显示在每个笔记上。如果启用了搜索，点击标签将搜索所有包含该标签的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: THIS WILL BREAK YOUR SITE IF YOU DON'T KNOW WHAT YOU ARE DOING! (But disabling will fix it). Determines whether to let all frontmatter data through to the site template. Be aware that this could break your site if you have data in a format not recognized by the template engine, 11ty.
ast.target: 如果您不知道自己在做什么，这会破坏您的站点！（但禁用此选项可以修复）。决定是否让所有 frontmatter 数据传递到站点模板。请注意，如果您的数据格式不被模板引擎 11ty 识别，这可能会破坏您的站点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize labels and messages shown on your garden (Search, Backlinks, etc.)
ast.target: 自定义您花园中显示的标签和消息（搜索、反向链接等）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 默认：“提及此页面的页面”

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default: "No other pages mentions this page"
ast.target: 默认：“没有其他页面提及此页面”

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 默认：“按 Enter 键选择”

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 默认：“按 ESC 键关闭”

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 默认：“选择一个结果进行预览”

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default: "Enter your search text in the box above"
ast.target: 默认：“在上方的框中输入您的搜索文本”

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manage themes, sitename and styling on your site
ast.target: 管理您站点的主题、站点名称和样式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Click the apply button to use the current style settings from the Style Settings Plugin on your site. (The plugin looks at the currently APPLIED settings. Meaning you need to have the theme you are using in the garden selected in Obsidian before applying)
ast.target: 点击应用按钮以将样式设置插件中的当前样式设置应用到您的站点。（该插件查看的是当前已应用的设置。这意味着您需要在 Obsidian 中选择您正在花园中使用的主题，然后再应用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of your site. This will be displayed as the site header.
ast.target: 您站点的名称。这将显示为站点标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to an image in your vault to use as a logo instead of the sitename. Leave blank to show sitename text.
ast.target: 您保险库中用作 Logo 的图片路径，将替代站点名称。留空则显示站点名称文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Language code (ISO 639-1) for the main language of your site. This is used to set the correct language on your site to assist search engines and browsers.
ast.target: 您站点主要语言的语言代码（ISO 639-1）。用于在您的站点上设置正确的语言，以协助搜索引擎和浏览器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to an svg in your vault you wish to use as a favicon. Leave blank to use default. Must be square! (eg. 16x16)
ast.target: 您保险库中希望用作网站图标的 SVG 路径。留空则使用默认值。必须是正方形！（例如 16x16）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default, the images on your site are compressed to make your site load faster. If you instead want to use the full resolution images, enable this setting.
ast.target: 默认情况下，您站点上的图片会被压缩以加快加载速度。如果您想使用全分辨率图片，请启用此设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The format string to render timestamp on the garden. Must be luxon compatible
ast.target: 在花园中渲染时间戳的格式字符串。必须兼容 luxon。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key to get the created timestamp from the frontmatter. Leave blank to get the value from file creation time. The value can be any value that luxon Datetime.fromISO can parse.
ast.target: 从 frontmatter 获取创建时间戳的键。留空则从文件创建时间获取值。该值可以是 luxon Datetime.fromISO 能解析的任何值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key to get the updated timestamp from the frontmatter. Leave blank to get the value from file update time. The value can be any value that luxon Datetime.fromISO can parse.
ast.target: 从 frontmatter 获取更新时间戳的键。留空则从文件更新时间获取值。该值可以是 luxon Datetime.fromISO 能解析的任何值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key for setting css-classes to the note body from the frontmatter.
ast.target: 从 frontmatter 设置笔记正文 CSS 类的键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key to get the note icon value from the frontmatter
ast.target: 从 frontmatter 获取笔记图标值的键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default value for note icon if not specified
ast.target: 如果未指定，笔记图标的默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is optional, but recommended. It is used for the "Copy Garden URL" command, generating a sitemap.xml for better SEO and an RSS feed located at /feed.xml.
ast.target: 这是可选的，但推荐。它用于“复制花园 URL”命令、生成 sitemap.xml 以获得更好的 SEO，以及位于 /feed.xml 的 RSS 源。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Transform the URL from "/My Folder/My Note/" to "/my-folder/my-note". If your note titles contains non-English characters, this should be disabled.
ast.target: 将 URL 从“/My Folder/My Note/”转换为“/my-folder/my-note”。如果您的笔记标题包含非英文字符，应禁用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define custom rules to replace parts of the note before publishing.
ast.target: 定义自定义规则以在发布前替换笔记的某些部分。

ast.target: 无法检查更新。请检查您的连接和凭据。

ast.target: 请先在插件设置中设置本地花园文件夹路径。

ast.target: 正在为笔记添加发布标志并发布。

ast.target: 发布操作已在进行中，请等待其完成。

ast.target: 无法将笔记URL复制到剪贴板，出现了一些问题。

ast.target: 当前文件不是Markdown或Canvas文件。请打开一个支持的文件后重试。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 笔记已成功发布到您的花园。

ast.target: 无法发布笔记，出现了一些问题。

ast.target: 此笔记已被设置为花园主页。

ast.target: 发布被阻止：存储空间已超限。请清理空间或在 dashboard.forestry.md/settings 升级。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Publish All Notes Marked for Publish
ast.target: 发布所有标记为发布的笔记

ast.target: 将花园导出到本地文件夹

ast.name: text
ast.source: Remember to read the setup guide if you haven't already. It can be found
ast.target: 如果您尚未阅读，请记得查看设置指南。它可以在以下位置找到：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 笔记设置文档可在以下位置获取：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Customize text displayed on your garden. Leave empty to use defaults.
ast.target: 自定义您的花园中显示的文本。留空则使用默认值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will create a pull request with the latest template changes. Your site won't be updated until you approve the PR.
ast.target: 这将创建一个包含最新模板更改的拉取请求。在您批准该PR之前，您的站点不会更新。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Approve the PR to make the changes go live.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your site template is already on the latest version.
ast.target: 您的站点模板已是最新版本。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Try deleting the "update-template" branch in your GitHub repository and try again.
ast.target: 请尝试删除 GitHub 仓库中的 \"update-template\" 分支，然后重试。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️ Important: Both notes should be published from the Publication Center to ensure your garden has a proper home page.
ast.target: ⚠️ 重要提示：为确保您的花园拥有正确的主页，两份笔记都应从发布中心发布。
